title: Deliciously Crunchy Norwegian Yellow Pepper Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Norwegian dish featuring yellow pepper, this recipe is halal-friendly and uses an air fryer for a crunchy snack, with a yeasty flavor from the addition of yeast extract.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the yellow peppers into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
In a bowl, mix together olive oil, yeast extract, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and lemon juice.
Add the bread crumbs to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Dip each yellow pepper piece into the egg and then coat with the bread crumb mixture.
Thread 3-4 coated yellow pepper pieces onto each skewer.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket in a single layer, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the skewers in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, shaking halfway through.
Serve the crunchy Norwegian yellow pepper skewers hot and enjoy.
